prompt: What is 17 * 23? Give only the number.
A draft model proposes 5 tokens per step and 3 are accepted on average. Over 40 steps, how many tokens are produced? Give only the number.
If memory bandwidth is 24 GB/s and a model streams 1.5 GB per token, how many tokens per second is the ceiling? Give only the number.
What is 144 divided by 12? Give only the number.
What is 7 cubed (7 to the power of 3)? Give only the number.
What is 15 percent of 240? Give only the number.
A model has 3 billion active parameters per token at 0.5 bytes per weight. How many gigabytes are streamed per token? Give only the number.
What is the sum of all integers from 1 to 100 inclusive? Give only the number.
A box has 8 GB of RAM and a model needs 17 GB to load. How many additional GB are required? Give only the number.
A process generates 2.8 tokens per second. How many tokens are produced in 5 minutes? Give only the number.
What is 256 multiplied by 4? Give only the number.
A quantization uses 4 bits per weight. How many bytes are needed to store 1024 weights? Give only the number.
What is 1000 minus the product of 37 and 17? Give only the number.
A draft model proposes 4 tokens per step with an acceptance rate of 0.75. What is the expected number of accepted tokens per step? Give only the number.
A train travels 60 kilometers in 45 minutes. What is its speed in kilometers per hour? Give only the number.
What is 2 to the power of 10? Give only the number.
How many distinct ways are there to choose 2 items from a set of 5? Give only the number.
What is 3.5 plus 4.25? Give only the number.
A file is 947 MB. Starting from 53000 MB of free disk, how many MB remain after copying the file 9 times? Give only the number.
What is one quarter plus one quarter plus one quarter, as a decimal? Give only the number.
A model has 24 layers and each layer takes 12 milliseconds. How many milliseconds does one full forward pass take? Give only the number.
What is 99 multiplied by 99? Give only the number.
A campaign lasts 72 hours and the wind-down margin is 10 percent of that. How many hours is the wind-down margin? Give only the number.
What is 64 divided by 2, then divided by 2, then divided by 2 again? Give only the number.
